## 1.

598 Technology is changing at an ever-faster pace. Three major trends are guiding the change: 5G networks, edge computing , and the Internet of Things ( IoT ). Altogether, they are making our digital world smarter, faster and more connected than we ever imagined. Explore how the synergy of edge computing and 5G is revolutionizing cloud computing , enabling real-time analytics, smart cities, and IoT innovation in 2025 .
